mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (login_id, email, password, name, grade, major, double_major, intro, approved, dept_id, role, account_status, profile_public) VALUES (#{login_id}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{double_major}, #{intro}, #{approved}, #{dept_id}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', TRUE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (login_id, password, email, name, dept_id, intro, role, account_status, approved) VALUES (#{login_id}, #{password}, #{email}, #{name}, #{dept_id}, #{intro}, 'USER', 'Active', FALSE)
INSERT INTO mentor (member_id, career, cert, field) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{career}, #{cert}, #{field})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mentor WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = '탈퇴회원', email = CONCAT('withdrawn_', member_id, '@removed.local'), intro = NULL WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET account_status = #{status} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (login_id, email, name, provider, provider_id, password, role, account_status, approved) VALUES (#{login_id}, #{email}, #{name}, #{provider}, #{provider_id}, #{password}, 'USER', 'ACTIVE', FALSE)
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET password = #{password} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
